title: Crucible — growth sync
summary: Solid sync with Crucible. Blake Harris confirmed the team is seeing strong adoption across both use cases we discussed. Key highlights: engineering handoff rollout is on track, two new team members are onboarding next month, and they're already thinking about expanding to the European team. No blockers. Next steps: share updated pricing proposal by Friday.

transcript.text: Before we get into the agenda — any quick wins to share since our last call?
Yeah, we shipped two new integrations using engineering handoff last week. The team is really happy with how it works.
